Hero.name: Andres Rios
Hero.description: focused on developing efficient, scalable and well-designed technological solutions.

About.title: About <highlight>me</highlight>
About.paragraph1: I am a software engineer in training, focused on developing efficient and well-structured digital solutions. I currently dedicate much of my time to strengthening my skills through projects and continuous learning.
About.paragraph2: On a personal level, I enjoy exploring new technologies, working on my own ideas, and immersing myself in video games and music that create unique experiences. I consider myself curious, self-taught, and always in search of new challenges that help me grow both professionally and personally.
